sections.heading: All other instructions in this regard shall remain unchanged.
sections.summary: This section states that all other instructions related to the matter remain unchanged. It serves as a procedural instruction to maintain consistency with existing directives without introducing new amendments. The instruction applies to the Reserve Bank of India's regulatory framework for deposit interest rates.

requirements.text: All other instructions in this regard shall remain unchanged.

sections.source_quote: All other instructions in this regard shall remain unchanged.
